subcodes.first_line: O thou who art present before the Wronged One! Hearken once again unto His call. I swear by the Sun of Utterance which from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الحاضر لدی المظلوم ندایش را مره اخری بشنو قسم بافتاب بیان که از افق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
